scripts.build:local: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/util && cp -R @types build/ && cp package.json kdts.d.ts bench.ts README.md build/ && cp util/assert.ts util/arrays.ts util/cli.ts build/util/ && bun kdts.ts kdts.ts --fast -o build/kdts.js && chmod +x build/kdts.js
scripts.build: rm -rf build && mkdir -p build/util && cp -R @types build/ && cp package.json kdts.d.ts bench.ts README.md build/ && cp util/assert.ts util/arrays.ts util/cli.ts build/util/ && bun kdts.ts kdts.ts --fast -o build/kdts.js --override Source=npm && chmod +x build/kdts.js
